challenges.title: Flex Container Basics
challenges.description: Write CSS for a `.nav` selector that sets `display` to `flex` and `justify-content` to `space-between`. Also set `align-items` to `center`. Assign your CSS to the variable `css`.
challenges.test_code:
assert '.nav' in css.lower(), 'Should target the .nav selector'
assert 'display' in css.lower(), 'Should use the display property'
assert 'flex' in css.lower(), 'Should set display to flex'
assert 'justify-content' in css.lower(), 'Should use justify-content'
assert 'space-between' in css.lower(), 'Should set justify-content to space-between'
assert 'align-items' in css.lower(), 'Should use align-items'
assert 'center' in css.lower(), 'Should set align-items to center'
hints: display: flex turns an element into a flex container.
justify-content: space-between puts equal space between items with no space at edges.
align-items: center vertically centers items in the container.

challenges.title: Flex Wrap and Flex Shorthand
challenges.description: Write CSS for a `.gallery` selector that sets `display` to `flex`, `flex-wrap` to `wrap`, and `align-items` to `stretch`. Then write a rule for `.gallery-item` that uses the `flex` shorthand set to `1 1 200px` (grow, shrink, basis). Also set `margin` to 10px on the gallery items. Assign your CSS to the variable `css`.
challenges.test_code:
assert '.gallery' in css.lower(), 'Should target the .gallery selector'
assert 'display' in css.lower(), 'Should use the display property'
assert 'flex-wrap' in css.lower(), 'Should use flex-wrap'
assert 'wrap' in css.lower(), 'Should set flex-wrap to wrap'
assert 'align-items' in css.lower(), 'Should use align-items'
assert 'stretch' in css.lower(), 'Should set align-items to stretch'
assert '.gallery-item' in css.lower(), 'Should target the .gallery-item selector'
assert 'flex' in css.lower(), 'Should use the flex shorthand on items'
assert '200px' in css.lower(), 'Should include 200px as the flex-basis'
assert 'margin' in css.lower(), 'Should set margin on gallery items'
assert '10px' in css.lower(), 'Should set margin to 10px'
hints: flex-wrap: wrap allows flex items to flow onto multiple lines.
The flex shorthand combines flex-grow, flex-shrink, and flex-basis: flex: 1 1 200px;
flex-basis sets the initial size of a flex item before growing or shrinking.
